creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
IniConf has changed to Config::IniFiles

I'm killing two birds with one PR:

	1) Finding abandoned Ports
	2) Getting Config::IniFiles in the tree so I can submit
	   ReportMagic which requires it.

So here's a recursive diff for a Repo Copy.

Also note that files/patch-aa is not present in the new version.
